subject: large crustacean creature with red claws, dark segmented Phyrexian-style carapace bearing a skull-like face, and trailing red tendrils/wires
description: A massive crustacean dominates the frame, lunging forward with oversized red claws. Its body is a dark, segmented carapace with organic-mechanical Phyrexian styling — a skull-like face is embedded in the thorax, and long red tendrils or wire-like filaments trail behind it. The background is murky green-yellow with hints of fire or toxic light below. The composition is a wide close-up with the creature angled toward the viewer, conveying aggression and corruption.
foreground: red clawed crustacean with skull-faced carapace and trailing red tendrils
background: murky green-yellow atmosphere with faint fiery glow below
